'''Brachnis Chorios''' was a cold, greenish-lavender [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the outer edge of the [[Chorios systems]], far from the triple stars and deep within the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]].

==History==
Although fairly unpopulated, the world's largest moon was designated as a meeting place between [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] just prior to the [[Death Seed]] outbreak.

{{Planet-stub}}
